posts.author: OscarEyV (Oscar Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi every one,
In our organization we use some pannels to view important imformation about the state of the company. Since there some users that dont interact or are required to view this information every day, we share the information via shared view. Some days ago these shared views sttoped working and now they only display the message “Oops… Something went wrong on our end”.
I tried with no success regenerating the link of the shared view, using the embedded code option and even duplicate the view and shearing the new one. I have not found the root of the problem but I am already in contac with the Monday Support. In the mean time I was hoping to know if someone else has experienced the same problem and if there are any ideas to work this around or how to fix it.

Thanks!
